testCases.title: CMS — Content Module Accessible in Admin
testCases.notes: Content navigation item visible in admin left sidebar. Content module accessible from /#!/workspace. Manages CMS pages, content, design.

testCases.title: CMS — Demo Landing Page Accessible in Footer
testCases.notes: Footer 'Online resources' section contains 'Demo Landing' link (/demo-landing). CMS page accessible from storefront navigation. Footer link present on all pages.

testCases.title: CMS — CMS Pages Appear in Search Suggestions
testCases.notes: Per project memory (feedback_cms_search_suggestions.md): CMS pages appear in search suggestions dropdown only, not in main search results grid. CMS content indexed for autocomplete suggestions.

testCases.title: CMS — Builder.io Integration
testCases.notes: Footer 'Online resources' shows 'Builder I.O' link (https://www.builder.io/). Builder.io CMS integration referenced in storefront. Per project CLAUDE.md: Builder.io / Virto Pages & vc-frontend testing documented.

testCases.title: CMS — News Page Accessible
testCases.notes: Footer contains 'News' link (/news). CMS news page accessible from footer. CMS-managed content pages available on storefront.

testCases.title: CMS — Contacts Page Accessible
testCases.notes: /contacts page accessible (SMK-026 health check verified: no 5xx errors). Contact Us link in header and footer. CMS-managed contact page.

testCases.title: CMS — 404 Page for Unknown URLs
testCases.notes: Navigating to unknown URL (/kitchen-supplies/pressure-cooker-200l) returns 404 page: 'QA & 404 Page not found'. CMS 404 page configured. No stack trace or server data exposed (SEC-SENSITIVE-002 verified).

testCases.title: CMS — Admin Content Module Navigation
testCases.notes: Content module in admin sidebar. CMS page management accessible. Admin can create/edit/delete CMS pages via Content module.

testCases.title: CMS — Branch/Vendor Page Accessible
testCases.notes: /branch/vendor-fulfillment accessible via footer 'Find a Branch' link. CMS branch locator page available. BOPIS branch information accessible.

testCases.title: CMS — About/External Pages in Footer
testCases.notes: Footer 'About us' section: About Virto, Our partners, Manufacturer partners, News (virtocommerce.com/blog), Careers. CMS-managed about pages accessible from footer.

testCases.title: CMS — Page Title Pattern (QA & <PageName>)
testCases.notes: CMS pages follow title pattern 'QA & <PageName>': 'QA & Cart', 'QA & Catalog', 'QA & 404 Page not found', 'QA & Orders', 'QA & Configurable Hat'. QA store prefix consistent across all CMS pages.

testCases.title: CMS — Footer Navigation Links
testCases.notes: Footer contains 6 navigation sections: Account details, About us, Popular categories, Online resources, External links, Customer support, Brands. All links present and functional.

testCases.title: CMS — Designer Block Workflow
testCases.notes: Per project memory (feedback_designer_block_workflow.md): Designer blocks use tune icon for context menu (not right-click), must add via library click-through, never use REST API for content. Admin CMS editing follows this pattern.

testCases.title: CMS — Storefront Sitemap
testCases.notes: Full sitemap (sitemap.md knowledge file): Home, Catalog categories, PDP, Search, Account pages, Checkout, B2B company pages, Static pages (About, Contact, Branch, Brands, News). CMS manages static and dynamic pages.

testCases.title: CMS — Popular Categories in Footer
testCases.notes: Footer 'Popular categories': Allbiz, Computer/Office/Education, Consumer Electronics, Home Appliances, Phones and Accessories. Category links CMS-configured in footer.

testCases.title: CMS — External Links Section
testCases.notes: Footer 'External links': Vcst-admin (https://vcst-qa.govirto.com/), Virto-start (https://virtostart-demo-store.govirto.com/). External store links managed via CMS.

testCases.title: CMS — Create New CMS Page
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Creating new CMS page via Admin Content module deferred.

testCases.title: CMS — Edit Existing CMS Page
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: Editing CMS page content via admin deferred.

testCases.title: CMS — Delete CMS Page
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: CMS page deletion deferred to avoid destroying test content.

testCases.title: CMS — CMS Page SEO Meta Tags
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: SEO meta tags (title, description, og tags) on CMS pages deferred to SEO suite.

testCases.title: CMS — Content Version History
testCases.notes: SKIPPED: CMS page version history and rollback via admin deferred.

testCases.title: CMS — CMS Page Slugs and URL Structure
testCases.notes: CMS pages use clean URLs: /demo-landing, /news, /contacts, /branch/vendor-fulfillment. URL slugs configured in CMS. SEO-friendly URLs for all content pages.

testCases.title: CMS — Admin CMS vs Builder.io CMS
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: Distinguishing which pages are managed by Admin CMS vs Builder.io integration requires admin Content module inspection. Per project CLAUDE.md: separate how-to-test documentation for Builder.io.

testCases.title: CMS — Successful Registration CMS Page
testCases.notes: BLOCKED: /successful-registration page (CMS-managed post-registration redirect) requires executing registration flow. Verified in AUTH-002 and SMK-002 but CMS-specific page management not inspected.
